description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a matte black finish and a full-sized keyboard featuring RGB backlighting. The screen is open and displays a software interface, likely for 3D modeling or game development, with a dark-themed UI and several windows visible. The laptop's chassis appears to be constructed from a combination of metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The keyboard includes a function row and a large touchpad below, with no visible numeric keypad. The sides of the laptop show multiple ports, including USB and possibly HDMI, indicating versatile connectivity. The exterior surfaces are smooth and unadorned, with no visible brand logos or stickers.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with an RGB-backlit keyboard and a screen displaying a software interface. The device features a modern, minimalist design with multiple side ports and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a software interface and the full RGB-backlit keyboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and visible side ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unmarked back of the laptop's screen.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional ports and the edge of the keyboard.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying a software interface with multiple windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with function row, no numeric keypad, RGB backlighting.
